case_title: QADEERA MADYUN, GUARDIAN et al VS. JEFFREY THOMPSON

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM IS "APPROVED".
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY MADYUN, GUARDIAN, QADEERA THOMPSON, JEFFREY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADYUN, GUARDIAN, QADEERA MADYUN, MINOR, MESSIAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, THE COURT FINDS THE ACCIDENT WAS WHOLLY THE FAULT OF DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY BOTH SIDES.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MADYUN, GUARDIAN, QADEERA MADYUN, MINOR, MESSIAH AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSON, JEFFREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT JEFFREY THOMPSON, RETURNED "FORWARD TIME EXPIRED/RETURN TO SENDER".
